end,function(a,N)local V=n(N)local K=function(K,x,W,v,L)return z(a,{K,x,W;v,L},N,V)end return K end,function(a)local N,z=127636-127635,a[501104-501103]while z do end,function(a,N)local V=n(N)local K=function(K,x,W,v,L,p)return z(a,{K;x;W,v;L;p},N,V)end return K end,function()s=(-927996-(-927997))+s f[s]=419249-419248 return s end,{},-13982-(-13982),function(a)f[a]=f[a]-(725211-725210)if f[a]==-280701-(-280701)then f[a],p[a]=nil,nil end end return(d(330922+11988039,{}))(V(L))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or
